name: Torrent Engine
description: VPN-isolated BitTorrent engine (MonoTorrent) with an HTTP/SSE control API, for other Hosty apps to drive downloads over a dependency.

settings.label: OpenVPN configuration
settings.description: The .ovpn file contents, raw or base64-encoded (base64 preferred for a single-line secret). Required — traffic is not routed until the tunnel is up.

settings.label: OpenVPN username
settings.description: Username for VPN authentication, if your provider requires it.

settings.label: OpenVPN password
settings.description: Password for VPN authentication, if your provider requires it.

settings.label: Control API token
settings.description: Optional shared secret. When set, every control-API request except /healthz must present it in the X-Api-Token header; when unset, the API is open.

settings.label: Torrent listen port
settings.description: TCP/UDP port the BitTorrent engine listens on inside the tunnel.

settings.label: Torrent bind address
settings.description: Bind the listen and DHT endpoint to a single address (e.g. the VPN tun address). Leave unset to bind IPv4 on all interfaces.

settings.label: Enable UPnP / NAT-PMP port mapping
settings.description: Automatic router port mapping. Off by default and generally unnecessary behind a VPN.

settings.label: Max download speed (bytes/sec)
settings.description: Global download rate limit in bytes per second (0 = unlimited). Per-download limits override it.

settings.label: Max upload speed (bytes/sec)
settings.description: Global upload rate limit in bytes per second (0 = unlimited). Per-download limits override it.

settings.label: Max active torrents
settings.description: Maximum number of concurrently registered torrents (0 = unlimited). Adds beyond the cap return 409.

settings.label: VPN interface
settings.description: Tunnel interface the killswitch confines traffic to and the monitor watches.

settings.label: VPN DNS resolver
settings.description: Tunnel-reachable DNS resolver used once the tunnel is up, so lookups don't leak or break.

settings.label: Exit-IP check
settings.description: Whether the monitor performs a best-effort exit-IP check (an outbound call over the tunnel).

settings.label: Exit-IP check URL
settings.description: Endpoint for the exit-IP check. A JSON body with ip/country is preferred; a plain-text IP is accepted.
